newContent: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Filestage: Product Marketing Manager Anywhere in the World Baden-Württemberg Sales and Marketing Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0162/0673/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://filestage.io/">https://filestage.io/</a> </p> <div class="sc-1fwbcuw-0 loQfvC"> <div> <h1><strong>About Filestage</strong></h1> <p>Filestage is the review and approval platform that helps teams get their work over the finish line with confidence. As AI speeds up content creation, the process of verifying and approving that work has become a major bottleneck. We provide the AI-powered infrastructure that ensures every file is checked, compliant, and approved before it is published.</p> <p>We are a fully remote team by design, built on a culture of high ownership, transparency and fast execution. Together, our mission is to create the trust layer for content creation in times of AI.&nbsp;</p> <p>With millions of users across thousands of companies—including Lufthansa, Rabobank, Sixt, and Sharp—we are an ambitious team solving real problems for the world's biggest brands. If you’re looking for a key role in that mission, you’ve found it!</p> <p><strong>⭐</strong>For this role, we’re looking for someone&nbsp;<strong>based in Europe&nbsp;</strong>to make sure there’s a high time overlap with our team members.</p> <h1><strong>What you’ll be working on as our Product Marketing Manager</strong></h1> <p>As AI accelerates content production, the human capacity to verify that content has become the ultimate bottleneck. At Filestage, we provide the Trust Layer—the automated governance pipeline that ensures every asset is safe, on-brand, and compliant before it is published. We are looking for a Product Marketing Manager to own our narrative and drive the adoption of this new standard in content review.</p> <p><strong>You will lead the product narrative:</strong>&nbsp;You’ll define our positioning and messaging, turning complex technical features like AI-driven quality checks and audit trails into clear business value for our customers.</p> <p><strong>You will build the Revenue Enablement toolkit:</strong>&nbsp;You’ll create the high-impact assets our Sales and Success teams need to win, including refined pitch decks, competitive battle cards, demo environments, and workflow guides that help close deals and defend our market position.</p> <p><strong>You will support customer lifecycle communication:</strong>&nbsp;Working alongside our interdisciplinary Growth Squads, you’ll help audit, plan, and scale our communication across email and in-app channels (using tools like Customer.io and Jimo). You’ll ensure the messaging is consistent as users move from their first "Aha!" moment to full product adoption.</p> <p><strong>You will lead the feature launch engine:</strong>&nbsp;You’ll own the end-to-end go-to-market process for new features. This means coordinating with Product and customer-facing teams to ensure every release reaches the right audience with the right message across all marketing channels, using AI and automation to scale tactical execution where appropriate.</p> <p><strong>You will be the voice of the market:</strong>&nbsp;You’ll conduct customer research, product usage audits, and win/loss analysis to understand the "why" behind user behavior. You’ll turn these insights into actionable strategies to improve conversion and product-market fit.</p> <p><strong>You will own our social proof:</strong>&nbsp;You take ownership of our profiles on platforms like G2, Capterra, and OMR, ensuring they are accurate, compelling, and used strategically as social proof and as an asset for Answer Engine Optimization (AEO).</p> <p>In this role, you bridge the gap between our product and our customers<strong>&nbsp;</strong>- helping teams understand what to say, when to say it, and why it matters, so that our product is better understood, adopted, and remembered</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h1><strong>Life at Filestage</strong></h1> <p>We believe people are more productive when they can choose their own schedule. So we’re proud to offer fully-remote roles that give you the perfect balance between work and life.</p> <p>Here are some of the benefits you can look forward to at Filestage:</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong> Work from where you're happiest and enjoy a flexible schedule.&nbsp;</strong>We've been fully remote from the start, giving you the opportunity to meet people all over the world and broaden your horizons.</p> <p>⭐ For this role, we’re looking for someone&nbsp;<strong>based in Europe&nbsp;</strong>to make sure there’s a high time overlap with our team members.&nbsp;</p> <p><strong> Meet up in real life.&nbsp;</strong>We all travel together at least once a year at our team retreat to have fun and get to know each other.</p> <p><strong> Enjoy a strong team culture.&nbsp;</strong>We're a group of knowledge seekers, reflective thinkers, clear communicators, goal owners, problem solvers, and team players. These are the values we strive for to help us achieve our mission.</p> <p><strong> Join a happy team.&nbsp;</strong>We've been rated five stars on Glassdoor by our lovely team.</p> <p><strong> Create a workspace that suits you.&nbsp;</strong>You'll get a €1,500 budget for hardware, as well as €500 for your home office — including a computer, webcam, or standing desk.</p> <p><strong> Get 38 days of holiday</strong>. Plenty of time for city breaks, summer escapes, and everything in between. You'll also get a half day on your birthday to celebrate!</p> <p><strong> Volunteer/Charity Day.&nbsp;</strong>Enjoy a dedicated day to support a cause close to your heart.</p> <p><strong> Continue to grow and develop your career</strong>. After six months, you'll get a personal development budget to invest in yourself.</p> <p><strong>️ Make your voice heard.</strong>&nbsp;We trust our team members to make the best decisions to achieve their goals — no micromanagers here.</p> <p><strong> Say goodbye to pointless meetings.&nbsp;</strong>Flat hierarchies, fast iterations, and no bullshit meetings.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h1>&nbsp;</h1> </div> </div> <h2 class="sc-1npqnwg-4 sc-1npqnwg-5 sc-1uwf3m5-0 sc-1uwf3m5-1 bimQCH custom-css-style-job-requirements">Job requirements</h2> <div class="sc-1fwbcuw-0 loQfvC"> <div> <ul> <li> <p>&nbsp;<strong>You have a proven track record in Product Marketing or Lifecycle Marketing.</strong>&nbsp;You bring 3--6 years of experience in a PLG (Product-Led Growth) environment and understand how product communication influences activation, expansion, and retention.</p> </li> <li> <p>️&nbsp;<strong>You communicate with clarity.</strong>&nbsp;You have excellent&nbsp;<strong>English skills (C1-level
